meta.name: Huawei-style PPTX layout registry
meta.status: practical layouts distilled from public mainslides; not an official template

global.titleSystem: red takeaway title, no top strip, no title underline

layouts.structure: light or high-key contextual image by default; 40-55% title and subtitle with intentional negative space; dark cover only for stage, exhibition, or explicit direction
layouts.red: title or one small focal cue
layouts.avoid: giant red blob, multiple decorative lines, producer-facing style label

layouts.use: company, customer, market, or outcome overview
layouts.structure: one evidence-bearing image, one claim, three to five key figures or facts
layouts.red: title and/or decisive figures; gray for icons and separators

layouts.use: technology evolution, maturity, or phased change
layouts.structure: one horizontal progression with a clear direction and an emphasized destination
layouts.red: destination, inflection, or current stage; not every connector

layouts.use: feedback, ecosystem, governance, or dual-engine model
layouts.structure: one loop or paired-loop mechanism plus concise inputs, outputs, and implications
layouts.red: active loop, selected engine, or key conversion point

layouts.structure: three to five horizontal layers with a narrow cross-cutting governance column when needed
layouts.red: one focal layer or selected node; gray borders and connectors

layouts.use: comparison, coverage map, curriculum, capability, or scope
layouts.structure: compact matrix with one highlighted row, column, or cell group
layouts.red: highlighted evidence only; no red grid lines

layouts.structure: three or four stages with explicit outputs and gates
layouts.red: current or recommended stage only; other stages remain dark or gray

layouts.structure: one relevant image or illustration, one oversized gray section number, one short section name, and at most three short subitems
layouts.red: selected subitem or one image focal cue

layouts.use: customer case, proof, pilot result, or reference architecture outcome
layouts.structure: challenge-action-outcome, timeline, or baseline-result spine with real imagery and dated sources
layouts.red: result family, key milestone, or decisive evidence group; never invented impact
